response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and mentoring
Broad technical stack spanning mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and infrastructure (Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Limited demonstration of mobile platform ecosystem experience beyond iOS app maintenance
Absence of documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap ownership
